name: smart-job-tracker
description: Smart Job Tracker workspace for the React frontend, Spring Boot Kotlin backend, and local Kubernetes runtime.

scripts.dev:cluster: npm run k8s:namespace && npm run k8s:check-secret && npm run docker:build && npm run k8s:load-images && npm run k8s:apply && npm run k8s:forward
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.frontend:verify: npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:format:check && npm run frontend:test:coverage && npm run frontend:build
scripts.backend:verify: npm run backend:format:check && npm run backend:lint && npm run backend:test:coverage
scripts.verify: npm run frontend:verify && npm run backend:verify
scripts.docker:build: npm run docker:build:backend && npm run docker:build:frontend
scripts.k8s:restart: kubectl rollout restart deployment/smart-job-tracker-backend --namespace smart-job-tracker && kubectl rollout restart deployment/smart-job-tracker-frontend --namespace smart-job-tracker
